'''Daniel Falconer''' is a designer and writer from New Zealand. He is a founding member of The Star Wars Artists' Guild.

==Biography==
Daniel Falconer has worked for [[Wikipedia:Weta Workshop|Weta Workshop Ltd.]] in Wellington, NZ since [[1996]] as a Conceptual Artist designing creatures, armor, weapons, costumes and props for various projects including ''Hercules''; ''Xena''; ''King Kong''; ''The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe'' and ''The Lord of the Rings'' film trilogy.<ref name="ANZ" />

He contributed interior illustrations to the [[Wizards of the Coast]] sourcebook ''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]'' (some of which were later republished in the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook]]'') and has designed a number of ''[[Star Wars Miniatures]]''. He had also contributed to [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (webcomics)|''The Clone Wars'' webcomics]].
